requirements_addressed: AC-001: test_cli_integration.py exists with TestCLIIntegration class
AC-003: test_get_transcript_real_video verifies full transcript fetch
AC-004: test_video_info_real_video exists (skipped until YouTubeClient available)
AC-005: All results validated as JSON with expected fields
AC-006: Exit codes verified (0 success, 1 error)
AC-007: Selective execution via pytest -m integration works

completion_promises.evidence: Created tests/integration/test_cli_integration.py with TestCLIIntegration class containing 5 test methods. File compiles and all tests are collected by pytest.

TestCLIIntegration class is decorated with both @pytest.mark.slow and @pytest.mark.integration at the class level, applying to all test methods. Markers are registered in pyproject.toml [tool.pytest.ini_options] markers to avoid warnings.

completion_promises.criterion_text: test_get_transcript_real_video verifies full transcript fetch for known public video (dQw4w9WgXcQ)
completion_promises.evidence: test_get_transcript_real_video makes a real network call to fetch transcript for dQw4w9WgXcQ with --no-segments. Asserts exit code 0, video_id matches, full_text has >100 chars, and all expected fields (language, language_code, is_auto_generated, total_segments, total_duration_seconds) are present with correct types. Test passes in 4s.

test_video_info_real_video exists and tests video-info command for dQw4w9WgXcQ. It is conditionally skipped with @pytest.mark.skipif when YouTubeClient is not available (FEAT-SKEL-002 dependency not yet implemented). When YouTubeClient is available, it will assert exit code 0 and validate video_id, title, channel, duration_seconds, and has_captions fields. The test exists and is correctly structured per the AC.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All results are valid JSON with expected fields
completion_promises.evidence: All test methods call json.loads(captured.out) to parse stdout as JSON. test_get_transcript_output_is_pure_json explicitly verifies stdout starts with '{', ends with '}', and parses as valid JSON. Field assertions check video_id, full_text, language, segments structure, error.code, error.message across all tests.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Exit codes are correct (0 for success)
completion_promises.evidence: test_get_transcript_real_video and test_get_transcript_real_video_with_segments assert exit_code == 0 for successful operations. test_get_transcript_invalid_video_returns_error asserts exit_code == 1 for error cases. test_video_info_real_video also asserts exit_code == 0 when enabled.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Tests can be run selectively: pytest -m integration
completion_promises.evidence: Verified with 'pytest -m integration --co -q' which collected exactly 5 tests from tests/integration/test_cli_integration.py (122 deselected). Also verified 'pytest -m slow --co -q' works identically. Markers registered in pyproject.toml to prevent PytestUnknownMarkWarning.
